title: salix fluviatilis var. sessilifolia
intro: Salix fluviatilis var. sessilifolia, also known as River Willow, is a variety of the Salix fluviatilis plant, a type of willow tree native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Salix fluviatilis var. sessilifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to reduce the severity of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Salix fluviatilis var. sessilifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
